name: Basic Day Trip
input: Plan a one-day cycling trip from Amsterdam
assertions: Response contains a distance sourced from plan_route tool
Response contains weather information from get_weather tool
All named POIs appear in find_pois tool results
Daily distance is between 30-80 km for casual cycling
Knooppunten junction numbers are mentioned

name: Multi-Day Experienced Cyclist
input: Plan a 3-day trip through the Veluwe for an experienced cyclist
assertions: Plan has 3 distinct days with separate routes
Daily distances are approximately 80-130 km (a few km under 80 is acceptable; 40-60 km days are not)
Accommodation is suggested for each overnight stop
Veluwe-specific attractions mentioned (Hoge Veluwe, Kröller-Müller, etc.)
All accommodations appear in find_accommodation tool results

name: Specific Destination for Beginner
input: I want to cycle from Rotterdam to Kinderdijk to see the windmills. I'm a beginner.
assertions: Total cycling distance is appropriate for a beginner (at most ~40 km)
Windmill-related POIs are included
Beginner-friendly advice is given
No distances or times are stated without tool backing

name: Unreasonable Distance Request
input: I want to cycle 200 km in one day, I'm a casual cyclist
assertions: Agent flags 200 km as unreasonable for a casual cyclist
Suggests splitting into multiple days or reducing distance
Does not simply plan a 200 km route without warning

name: Far Future Date
input: Plan a cycling trip from Utrecht for December 2027
assertions: Agent plans route and POIs normally
Agent explains weather forecast is unavailable beyond 16 days
Does not fabricate weather data

name: Seasonal Query - Tulips
input: Where should I cycle to see tulips in April?
assertions: Keukenhof or Lisse area is suggested
Route is planned to the tulip region
April timing is acknowledged as tulip season (next April if it has passed this year)

name: Image Input - Landscape Photo
input: I want to cycle somewhere that looks like this. One day, starting from Rotterdam.
assertions: Image is recognized as a Dutch windmill / polder landscape
A matching region is suggested (e.g. Kinderdijk windmill area)
A route is planned from Rotterdam to the suggested area

name: Out of Scope Location
input: Plan a cycling trip in the Swiss Alps
assertions: Agent redirects to Netherlands scope
Does not plan a Swiss route
Suggests a Netherlands alternative or asks to refocus
